title: linum suffruticosum f. jimenezii
intro: Linum suffruticosum f. jimenezii, also known as Jimenez's flax or Jimenez's prickly flax, is a subspecies of the Linum suffruticosum plant, a species of flowering plant in the family Linaceae. This plant is traditionally used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, as well as its ability to promote wound healing. The health benefits of Linum suffruticosum f. jimenezii include reducing inflammation, promoting skin health, and supporting the immune system. The plant can be prepared as herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, and is also used in topical applications such as creams and salves.
